original_snippet_context: A descriptive, humorous article focusing on a new public kiosk in Largo da Carioca, its nickname, and function as an information hub.  Not related to monetary policy debates.
justification: Although the article does mention a "caixa," it is in relation to physical information kiosque and thus not related to the monetary "Caixa de Conversão" discussed in the 1906 debates.
